query:
SELECT s.code, s.name, 
  c.name as country, 
  r.name as region, 
  ci.name as city, 
  st.name as site_type
FROM sites s
LEFT JOIN countries c ON s.countryId = c.id
LEFT JOIN regions r ON s.regionId = r.id
LEFT JOIN cities ci ON s.cityId = ci.id
LEFT JOIN siteTypes st ON s.siteTypeId = st.id
ORDER BY r.name, ci.name, s.code;

  ci.name as city, 
  st.name as site_type

LEFT JOIN countries c ON s.countryId = c.id
LEFT JOIN regions r ON s.regionId = r.id
LEFT JOIN cities ci ON s.cityId = ci.id
LEFT JOIN siteTypes st ON s.siteTypeId = st.id
ORDER BY r.name, ci.name, s.code;
